name: nmt-enfr
description: Framework-neutral browser EN-FR / FR-EN neural machine translation runtime for Transformers.js.

scripts.test: npm run test:check && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/client.js && node --check src/glossary.js && node --check src/planning.js && node --check src/text.js && node --check src/document.js && node --check src/worker.js && node --check test/*.test.mjs
